description_long: This is a commemorative stone monument with a rectangular base and a slanted front face, featuring a prominent bronze or metal plaque. The plaque is inscribed with a dedication to John Cook, describing him as a renowned librarian, and is bordered by a decorative frame. The monument is constructed from rough-hewn stone, giving it a rugged and durable appearance, and sits atop a slightly raised stone platform. The base is surrounded by a patch of grass and some low vegetation, with a concrete or stone border on one side. The rear and sides of the monument are unadorned, showing only the natural stone texture. The overall design is utilitarian, with the main visual interest focused on the inscribed plaque at the front.
description: A rugged stone monument with a slanted front face bearing a bronze plaque, set on a grassy patch with a stone base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the inscribed bronze plaque dedicated to John Cook, framed by rough stone and surrounded by grass.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the thick, rough stone structure and the slanted angle of the plaque, with visible grass and a concrete border.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain, unadorned stone back of the monument, with no inscriptions or decorations.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the stone's texture, the slant of the plaque, and the surrounding grass.
attribute_inscription: A bronze plaque on the front face bears the inscription: 'A MEMORIAL ROSE GARDEN TO JOHN COOK A RENOWNED LIBRARIAN WORTHY OF THIS HONOR WHOSE FAME WILL NEVER DIE.' The text is in uppercase, English, and is clearly legible with a formal serif font.
attribute_ornamentation: The only ornamentation is the decorative border framing the bronze plaque on the front face.
attribute_base_design: The base is a rectangular stone platform, slightly raised above the ground, with rough-hewn edges and a natural stone texture. It is surrounded by grass and bordered on one side by a concrete or stone strip.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the monument is flat and unadorned, following the rectangular shape of the stone block.
attribute_surrounding_features: The monument is immediately surrounded by a patch of grass, some low vegetation, and a concrete or stone border on one side.
